items.title: Buy the Dip in GE Aerospace or Netflix Stock After Q3 Earnings?
items.description: As two of the market's top-performing stocks in recent years, the discussion of buying the post-earnings dip in GE Aerospace (GE) or Netflix (NFLX) shares is a worthy topic.

items.title: Tesla Investors Pivot to Dreams of AI Future as EV Sales to Slow
items.description: Chief among them is its stunning lack of earnings growth while its stock price continues to soar.  The Elon Musk-led electric vehicle-maker is expected to post a 25% drop in third-quarter profits from a year ago when it reports earnings Wednesday afternoon, according to data compiled by Bloomberg.  The decline is nothing new, as Tesla’s results have been in retreat for multiple years.

items.title: Will FAA’s 737 MAX Production Boost Change Boeing’s (BA) Growth Narrative?
items.description: The Federal Aviation Administration recently approved Boeing to raise its 737 MAX production rate from 38 to 42 aircraft per month, reflecting renewed regulatory confidence after previous manufacturing and safety issues. This boost in production capacity, paired with operational improvements and leadership changes, signals that Boeing is making progress toward resolving prior challenges and focusing on growth in both revenue and margin recovery. We'll explore how the FAA’s decision to lift...

items.title: Will Boeing (BA) Report Negative Earnings Next Week? What You Should Know
items.description: Boeing (BA) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

items.title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Lockheed Martin, Boeing, RTX, SHLD, ITA and PPA
items.description: As the Gaza ceasefire falters, defense stocks like Lockheed Martin, Boeing, and RTX surge, putting ETFs ITA, PPA, and SHLD in focus.
